summary.description:
Today, a bit warmer for the outside temperature (up 3.5°C) and feels like temperature (up 1.9°C).

The past week and month had observable variation in the amount of wind (up 20 miles) and cloud levels (down 126 m) when compared to today.

summary.summary: Inside; anticipate mild and comfortable temperatures. Outside; heat will be very noticeable, though not extreme. Also, humidity will be quite oppressive and some wind, breezy at times. Drizzle or light rain possible, cloud cover will be variable, overcast at times, and bright sunshine will dominate the day. The weather will likely remain the same.
